name: Toasty Cinnamon Popcorn
recipeIngredient: 6 cups Cereal for cinnamon toast flavor
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. Melt margarine in a 13x9-inch pan until smooth.
3. Stir in cereal and popcorn, coating evenly with the melted margarine.
4. Bake for 5 minutes, then stir.
5. Bake for an additional 5 minutes.
6. Allow to cool before storing in an airtight container. Makes 12 cups.
